description: A performance dataset configured to track different sets of performance workloads.

filters.description: Filtered metrics for configuring this dataset.

items.description: Performance metrics that can be used to configure a performance dataset.
Performance metrics that can be used to configure a performance dataset.

name.description: The name of the performance dataset. If a name is not specified then a default name is assigned. The default name will be an underscore separated list of the performance metrics and filters used to configure the dataset.
